title: taraxacum pudilii
intro: Taraxacum pudilii, also known as the lesser dandelion or common dandelion, is a plant species in the sunflower family that is often mistaken for the common dandelion (Taraxacum officinale). The medicinal properties of Taraxacum pudilii include its ability to act as a diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant, which are used to treat a variety of health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Taraxacum pudilii can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
